falsification_rule_text: Pre-CBAM leakage leg not supported if (a) EU ETS price elasticity of carbon-intensity-weighted imports is zero or wrong-signed at p<0.10, OR (b) CBAM-product imports did not grow faster from high-intensity sources than low-intensity sources 2018-2023. Post-CBAM leg not supported if (c) the post-2026 × carbon-intensity-gap interaction is zero on EU imports, OR (d) trade-deflection (third-country to non-EU) is zero (suggesting volume just stops rather than reroutes — not leakage but demand destruction). Mixed verdict permitted: pre-leakage signature without post-CBAM reversal would suggest CBAM is inadequately calibrated.

variables_loaded.name: cbam_transitional_dummy
variables_loaded.source: constructed: indicator = 1 from 2023-10 (transitional reporting phase begin) onwards; 0 otherwise.

variables_loaded.name: cbam_definitive_dummy
variables_loaded.source: constructed: indicator = 1 from 2026-01 (definitive phase, financial liability) onwards; 0 otherwise.

variables_loaded.name: exporter_country_real_exchange_rate_eur
variables_loaded.source: constructed: bilateral REER vs EUR for major CBAM exporters (CHN, TUR, IND, KOR, RUS). bis or imf source.

variables_missing.name: cbam_carbon_intensity_weighted_imports
variables_missing.source: constructed: country-product CO2/tonne intensity (from CBAM transitional-phase declarations 2023-2025; cross-checked against IEA / OECD embedded-carbon-trade tables) × tonnes imported. Manual-drop pending under data/manual/derived/.

variables_missing.name: log_extra_eu_imports_share_of_consumption
variables_missing.source: constructed: extra-EU imports / (EU production + extra-EU imports - EU exports) for each CBAM product. Eurostat prom_dsx (production) + comtrade (trade).

variables_missing.name: cbam_carbon_intensity_gap_eu
variables_missing.source: constructed: (exporter-country CO2/tonne for product) − (EU CO2/tonne benchmark for product). Higher gap = higher CBAM cost burden. Continuous treatment intensity.
